name: Accurate
effect: Increase the Weapon Skill (BS/WS) of attacks with this weapon this turn by 1.

name: Beskar
effect: For the purposes of the Lightsaber trait, this weapon is considered a Lightsaber.

name: Blast
effect: For the next attack with this weapon, all fighters within the specified radius (default 2") of the target take 2 damage if the attack rolls at least one hit or crit.

name: Convertible
effect: Start the game in one configuration. Use this double to switch the weapon to a different mode listed in its profile.

name: Disorient
effect: After a successful hit, the target's BS and WS are reduced by 1 until the end of the round.

name: Gunslingers Gambit
effect: The fighter may make two separate attack actions with this weapon against different targets. Each attack uses half the weapon's total attack dice (round up).

name: Immobile
effect: This fighter cannot make a Move action while this weapon is equipped unless it is 'Stowed'.

name: Impact
effect: If this fighter finishes a Move action within 1" of an enemy, they may make a free attack with this weapon using 2 attack dice and 1/1 damage.

name: Indirect Fire
effect: This weapon can target a point on the map rather than a fighter. If so, the DEF of the target point is 5.

name: Lightsaber
effect: If the target has Def 5+, reduce it by 2. Reactions cannot be triggered against this weapon unless the reactor also has a Lightsaber.

name: Limited(1)
effect: This weapon can only be used a limited number of times per game (default 1).

name: Parry
effect: Reaction: After being hit but before damage, change one crit into a hit or one hit into a miss.

name: Piercing
effect: For the next attack with this weapon, if the target has a Def of 5 or greater, reduce the Def of the target by 2.

name: Quick Draw
effect: Before attacking with this weapon, this fighter can take a free 2" move (cannot Disengage).

name: Rapid Fire
effect: For the rest of the turn, attacks with this weapon gain +1 attack dice.

name: Reload
effect: This weapon may only be fired once per turn.

name: Scope
effect: Gain +1 BS/WS if the shooter has not moved this turn.

name: Silent
effect: Attacks do not break Stealth. Target fighters cannot make reactions against this attack.

name: Stun
effect: On a critical hit, the target loses an action (gain a wait token or advance an activated token).

name: Suppressive
effect: Give the target a token: -1 Attack and -1" Move until the end of their next activation.

name: Versatile
effect: This weapon can be used to make melee attacks at Range 0-2 using the fighter's Ballistic Skill instead of Weapon Skill.

name: Armour Piercing
effect: For the next attack with this weapon, if the target has a Def of 5 or greater, reduce the Def of the target by 2.

name: Scope
effect: Gain +1 Weapon Skill (BS/WS) if the shooter has not moved this turn.

name: Immobile
effect: A fighter with this weapon cannot perform Move or Disengage actions while it is equipped.

name: Brutal
effect: After an attack roll, upgrade one hit to a crit.
